34847.509999999 PAC total

item.title: Important Balances
item.description:
The charts on this page record balance changes of key accounts.

Please note that when an account has no transactions, the chart will not display corresponding graphics.

Exchange Balances #

Exchange account chart balance does not include balances from uncollected addresses.

  • Xeggex Exchange
  • Azbit Exchange
  • Exbitron Exchange

Genesis Account Balances #

  • Foundation
  • VC Allocation
  • Team and Operations
  • Community

Team Account Balances #
